description: SketchUp Make 2017 is open with a flat-roofed commercial building model. The Skelion solar plugin is installed. Your task is to design a southwest-facing solar array optimized for afternoon peak pricing. 1) Open the Skelion plugin dialog. 2) Set the Azimuth to 225 degrees. 3) Set the Tilt angle to 20 degrees. 4) Select the top roof face and insert the solar panels. 5) Save the completed model as 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\solar_azimuth_project.skp'.
